source_pr.title: statistics: forbid global-stats in stats-ver1 and make analyze options take effect in global-stats
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #xxx <!-- REMOVE this line if no issue to close -->

Problem Summary: statistics: forbid global-stats in stats-ver1 and make analyze options take effect in global-stats

### What is changed and how it works?
statistics: forbid global-stats in stats-ver1 and make analyze options take effect in global-stats

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- statistics: forbid global-stats in stats-ver1 and make analyze options take effect in global-stats

symptoms: tk.MustQuery("select distinct_count, null_count, tot_col_size, correlation=0 from mysql.stats_histograms where is_index=0 order by table_id asc").Check( (statistics/handle/handle_test.go)
failure_signature: tk.MustQuery("select distinct_count, null_count, tot_col_size, correlation=0 from mysql.stats_histograms where is_index=0 order by table_id asc").Check( (statistics/handle/handle_test.go)
fix_pattern: tk.MustQuery("select distinct_count, null_count, tot_col_size, correlation=0 from mysql.stats_histograms where is_index=0 order by table_id asc").Check( (statistics/handle/handle_test.go)

evidence: evidence: tk.MustQuery("select distinct_count, null_count, tot_col_size, correlation=0 from mysql.stats_histograms where is_index=0 order by table_id asc").Check( (statistics/handle/handle_test.go)

files: executor/analyze.go, executor/analyze_test.go, executor/builder.go, executor/show_stats.go, executor/simple_test.go, statistics/handle/dump_test.go, statistics/handle/handle.go, statistics/handle/handle_test.go, statistics/handle/update_test.go, statistics/histogram.go
